title: Wilhelmsen debuts vessel lifecycle specialist
content: Wilhelmsen Ship Management has launched a dedicated vessel lifecycle company called Cyclus Marine. Covering newbuildings, drydocking, riding crews, retrofits, conversions and recycling, the new company’s stated aim is to protect asset value, reduce risk, and support long-term performance. “Cyclus Marine brings together capabilities we already deliver daily, except now we present them in a clearer, …

title: Marielena Procopiou tanker venture enters suezmax segment with China order
content: Akrotiri Tankers is pushing further into the newbuilding market, branching out into larger crude tonnage. The Athens-based owner, run by Marielena Procopiou and Konstantinos Lampsias, has returned to China’s New Times Shipbuilding for fresh orders, according to market sources. Greek brokers say the latest deal includes a 157,000 dwt suezmax newbuild priced at around $82m, …
